title: Head-down Display Continuation
description: A continuation of the mod Head-down Display to more modern versions
body:
**This mod was made on commission**

This is a continuation of the mod [Head-down Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/hdd) made for more modern versions of the game!

The purpose is to automatically hide the hotbar when it is not in use. As such, it is a ***client-side only*** mod.

***Want to host a server? I am partnered with Bisect Hosting! You can use code '[DimHop](https://bisecthosting.com/DimHop)'  For 25% off your first month!***
